name: update_settings
description: Configure how a Meilisearch index processes and ranks search results. Control which attributes are searchable, filterable, and sortable. Set up synonyms, stop words, typo tolerance, ranking rules, and displayed attributes to fine-tune relevance.

parameters.name: indexUid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the index to configure.

parameters.name: searchableAttributes
parameters.description: Ordered list of attributes used for text matching. Earlier attributes have higher priority.

parameters.name: filterableAttributes
parameters.description: Attributes that can be used in filter expressions during search.

parameters.name: sortableAttributes
parameters.description: Attributes that can be used for sorting search results.

parameters.name: synonyms
parameters.description: Map of words to their synonyms. Keys are words, values are arrays of synonyms.

parameters.name: rankingRules
parameters.description: Ordered list of ranking rules. Default: ['words','typo','proximity','attribute','sort','exactness'].
